name: snapdrop
tagline: A browser-based AirDrop-like file sharing tool for local networks
description: Snapdrop is a self-hosted web-based file sharing app that behaves like AirDrop in the browser. Devices on the same network can instantly exchange files without accounts.

features.title: Local File Sharing
features.description: Share files directly between nearby devices

features.title: Browser-Based Transfers
features.description: Transfer files using a web browser

features.title: Peer Discovery
features.description: Discover devices on the local network

features.title: Cross-Platform Support
features.description: Share files across different operating systems

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Host the service on your own network
